strategies.description: Pattern around 'tasks': 33 lessons share this theme. Example: gemini-2.5-pro is a reliable and cost-effective choice for medium-complexity reasoning and coding tasks.
Pattern around 'choice': 17 lessons share this theme. Example: For other:easy tasks, gemini-2.5-flash is a reliable, cost-effective choice (verified in production at ~100% quality).
Pattern around 'coding': 3 lessons share this theme. Example: gpt-4o-mini consistently performs at a high success rate (95%) for hard coding tasks like merging k sorted linked lists.
